quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly defines the cost (1 sorcery point) and the effect (doubles duration, max 24 hours) for specific spell types (duration >= 1 minute).
quality.completeness: Complete. Contains all necessary fields for defining a feature.

mechanics.effect: Duration doubling, subject to a 24-hour cap.
mechanics.trigger_condition: Casting a spell with a duration of 1 minute or longer.
mechanics.balance_considerations: Very strong for extending utility spells (e.g., *Shield of Faith*, *Detect Magic* (if lasting that long via duration adjustment), or long-duration buffs). The 24-hour cap prevents infinite duration stacking but allows for full-day coverage with a single resource expenditure.
